name: utterughs

metadata.name: UtterUghs
metadata.summary: Do you want a package to spit out utter ughs for you? Here you go!

documentation:
# UTTER-UGHS

Bored of an afternoon or is your boss annoying you? Spit an ugh out!! 

```Python
from utterughs import ughs

print(ughs())
```

functions.name: utterughs.ughs.ughs
documentation:
Ughs

Spit out a random utter ugh for you.

# Parameters

# Returns

str

: Return a string of ugh.

# Examples

```pycon
>>> print(ugh()).
```
